nodes.name: 鸟纲
nodes.summary: 鸟纲（Aves）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联10767种鸟类，如丹顶鹤、朱鹮、中华秋沙鸭等10767种鸟类。

nodes.name: Meliphaga
nodes.summary: Meliphaga（Meliphaga）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联17种鸟类，如Puff-backed honeyeater、Yellow-spotted honeyeater、Lewin's honeyeater等17种鸟类。

nodes.name: Mottle-breasted honeyeater
nodes.summary: The mottle-breasted honeyeater (Meliphaga mimikae), also known as the spot-breasted meliphaga, is a species of bird in the family Meliphagidae. It is found throughout New Guinea. Its natural habitats are subtropical or tropical moist lowland forests and subtropical or tropical moist montane forests. References
nodes.shortSummary: The mottle-breasted honeyeater (Meliphaga mimikae), also known as the spot-breasted meliphaga, is a species of bird in the family Meliphagi…

nodes.name: LC
nodes.summary: LC表示 IUCN 无危等级，当前关联8208种鸟类，如鸵鸟、鸸鹋、南方鶴鴕等8208种鸟类。
